rationale: Both notes show strong overlap in domain and constructs: music-platform social networks, creator/artist outbound networking actions, network position (degree/density/status), and downstream success outcomes (plays/follower growth). The cited study provides a dynamic framework and panel identification strategy for how networking activities reshape networks and performance, which is plausibly foundational/background-method relevant to the citing study; with an exact DOI match, this is not clearly an incidental mention.
